name: About
description: An about page with hero, company story, team section, company stats, and call-to-action

fields.heading: About Us
fields.subheading: We believe the web should be fast, flexible, and accessible to everyone. Meet the team and mission behind VibeCMS.

fields.body:
Our Story

We started with a simple frustration: every CMS on the market forced a trade-off between developer flexibility and editorial simplicity. Monolithic platforms were slow and brittle; headless solutions left content teams stranded without a decent editing experience. We knew there had to be a better way.

So we built VibeCMS — a single-binary, high-performance content management system that treats speed as a feature, not an afterthought. From day one, we designed around sub-50ms page loads, a block-based editor that anyone can use, and a zero-rebuild extension architecture that lets developers ship new features without downtime.

Today, VibeCMS powers hundreds of sites for agencies, startups, and enterprises around the world. Our small, focused team remains committed to the same principles we started with: performance without compromise, simplicity without sacrificing power, and a platform that grows with you.

fields.heading: Our Mission
fields.body: We exist to give every team — from solo creators to large agencies — the tools to build fast, beautiful websites without fighting their CMS. Our mission is to eliminate the complexity that stands between a great idea and a live page. We do this by combining the performance of a static site with the flexibility of a full content platform.

fields.heading: Want to Work With Us?
fields.body: Whether you are looking for a CMS for your next project or want to join our team, we would love to hear from you.
